items.title: Portugal Front-end Developer @ Alts Digital
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

⭐ About Alts Digital
Alts Digital is a dynamic and fast-growing company that thrives on its self-sufficiency. We specialize in guiding online users to the best services tailored to their needs, thus driving customer acquisition for leading brands within the iGaming, Financial and Crypto sectors.
Our mission is to build products that potential consumers can use to obtain information and learn more about the available solutions in the market, and to help them choose the best provider for their needs.
Based in Portugal, we operate as a 100% remote company with a global presence. Our diverse team, consisting of over +40 members from more than 10 different countries, helping thousands of customers worldwide.
As fellow founders, engineers, SEO managers, designers, dog and cat lovers, adventurers, coders, and parents, we are driven by our shared passion for success. We like to move fast, think ambitiously, and are excited to expand our team by welcoming a new Front-end Developer.


### Descrição da vaga

✔️ What You'll Do
You can expect to take ownership of:

- Collaborating with other Developers, Designers and Product Managers to create the most compelling and successful experience possible.
- Helping to create a fantastic User Experience through the implementation of design on our diverse range of products.
- Performing hands-on development, testing, debugging, and ongoing maintenance of new and existing code.
- Ensuring high performance and availability, and managing all technical aspects.
- Solving technical challenges for new features.
- Keeping up-to-date with emerging design techniques and trends.

### Local

Portugal (remote)

### Requisitos

🧠 Your attitude & background

- Experience with HTML, CSS and pre-processors like SASS/LESS, as well as design tools such as Figma.
- Strong understanding of JavaScript frameworks (e.g.: React or Vue). Experience with NextJs is a plus.
- Experience with API integration is required, understanding how to connect and interact with data sources.
- At least 2 years of development experience using web technologies.
- Experience collaborating with designers and working with wireframes, mockups, and design systems.
- Understanding of SEO and accessibility principals is a plus.
- Strong attention to detail and accuracy in materialising our vision for our products.
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to effectively communicate financial concepts to non-financial stakeholders.
- Drive to excel and see things flourish in a small, dynamic team.
- Passion for staying on the bleeding edge of platforms, methodologies and web trends.
- A personal portfolio of work, beyond what you've done on the job (show us your personal Github repo or contributions to other projects!).
- Striking a balance between functional and aesthetic design.
- Based in Portugal.

💻 Our Tech Stack (Front-end)

- HTML, CSS, SASS/LESS, Modular CSS
- Javascript, jQuery, React, NEXT.js
- NPM, Yarn, Gulp, Grunt, Webpack
- Version control system: Git, Gitlab
- Infrastructure, configuration and deployment: Docker
- CI/CD: Gitlab runners / Vercel


### Benefícios

🎁 Benefits You’ll Receive

- 100% remote startup environment with all its ups and downs. Mostly ups.
- Salary: up to €40k per year, depending on your skill level, experience and location.
- Working 100% remotely with a flexible schedule. We measure results, not hours.
- Workation — a mix of work and vacation. Once a year, we find a cool place to work and have fun together.
- Alts Ville: We have a house in the stunning Madeira Island available for all employees who want to spend some time with friends, colleagues, and family 🏝️
- Health Insurance. We value the well-being and health of our team. To ensure that everyone feels cared for, we offer Health Insurance 🏥
- 1.000€ / year - financial support in other areas of your life, e.g., professional development.
- We offer a 100€ monthly voucher to use in co-working spaces. Working remotely doesn’t have to mean working from home every day.

### Contratação

Contrato a termo certo

### Como se candidatar

Apply to this job here: https://jobs.altsdigital.com/o/front-end-developer-1

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

_No response_

### Keywords

_No response_

### Alocação

- [ ] Alocado
- [x] Remoto
- [ ] Presencial
- [ ] Híbrido

### Regime

- [x] Contrato
- [ ] Freela
- [ ] RV

### Nível

- [ ] Júnior
- [ ] Pleno
- [x] Sênior
- [ ] Especialista

### Período

- [x] Full time
- [ ] Part Time
- [ ] Projeto

### Remuneração

None

items.title: [Lisboa] Senior Front-End Angular Developer @Share IT
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

We’re growing our development team and looking for a quality-driven and committed Senior Front-End Developer with Angular to join our development team. We love team players that wish to work in an international and multidisciplinary development environment.

We are a group of companies that specializes in areas such as innovation, marketing, technology, and software development. We have offices in Dublin, Lisbon, and Toronto and delivery centers in Portugal and Romania.

### Descrição da vaga

Our client supplies the most innovative ERP software suite of the moment, combining everyday processes with (among other things) 3D gaming technology and UI/UX of the highest level. They develop various other applications around this, such as integrated web shops, 3D configurators, room planners and AR/VR solutions that increasingly connect or even overlap. As the Dutch market leader in the residential sector, our client offers advanced solutions for retailers, suppliers, retail organizations and formula groups in the Benelux. They distinguish theirselves by applying a combination of the latest technologies and their unique brainwaves to solve daily challenges in this industry.

Responsibilities
As part of our client’s team, you will build software applications using languages and technologies based on Angular. Your day-to-day responsibilities and tasks will include:
- Develop new components that take the UI/UX to a higher level.
- Further develop an even smarter product configurator.
- Complete and roll out the latest version of the ERP system.
- Find efficient solutions to all sorts of challenges.
- Deliver software that meets the needs of customers.
- Attend daily stand-up meetings to discuss progress and blockers.
- Work on assigned tasks, such as developing new features, fixing bugs, or refactoring code.
- Write unit tests and integration tests to ensure that code is working as expected.
- Participate in code reviews to help improve the quality of code.
- Deploy software to production environments.
- Research new technologies and trends.

### Local

Híbrido - Lisboa

### Requisitos

- 10+ years of professional experience as a Front-End Developer.
- 3+ years of working experience in Angular.
- Bachelor's degree in a relevant field.
- Knowledge and experience with JavaScript.
- Good communication skills, preferably in English in addition to Portuguese or Dutch.
- Analytical ability.
- Experience with Java, Three.js, and SASS is an advantage.

### Benefícios

- To be part of a multidisciplinary and motivated team.
- Active role in the development of innovative projects.
- Possibility of collaboration in a hybrid regime.
- To be part of a growing international team.
- Salary range between 40.000€ - 48.000€ annual gross.

### Contratação

A combinar

### Como se candidatar

careers@shareit.network

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

_No response_

### Keywords

Angular

### Alocação

- [ ] Alocado
- [ ] Remoto
- [ ] Presencial
- [X] Híbrido

### Regime

- [X] Contrato
- [ ] Freela
- [ ] RV

### Nível

- [ ] Pleno

items.title: [Remote] FullStack Developer (Vue + Node) @YellowIpe
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

Our mission is to inspire the connection between technology and people, we foster the best of our professionals through our expertise in finding and attracting the best talent for the best projects. The Focus on People, Collaboration and Commitment are the pillars that guide us in this trajectory.

### Descrição da vaga

Join the yellow team as our new Developer (Node + Vue Js)!

### Local

Remote

### Requisitos

#### Obrigatórios:

- You have a degree in computer science, media computer science or a comparable training
- You have more than 5 years of experience in software development, ideally in e-commerce
- Your knowledge of Node.js, Vue.js or other reactive frameworks paired with CSS / SASS is first class
- Cloud services are more than a cloud for you, you have already worked in the FaaS and PaaS environment
- Do you have experience in SQL and NoSQL databases and your technology decisions are based on requirements?
- You have already successfully developed microservice architectures productively
- KISS, DDD, TDD, BDD are not just buzzwords for you, but important methods and principles of software development
- You have experience in dealing with agile development and CI / CD
- You are no stranger to experience with AWS or other CI / CD pipelines and planning tools
- You enjoy sharing your knowledge and like to hold a TechTalk for your colleagues
- You enjoy teamwork
- You are confident in the English-speaking world

### Benefícios

- Plano de saúde
- Seguro de vida



### Contratação

RV ou CTI

### Como se candidatar

Candidate-se para essa oportunidade enviando o seu CV para: recrutamento@yellowipe.io

items.title: [Remoto] ReactJS Developer @ Minthouse
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

Somos uma pequena empresa de software sediada em Singapura. Criamos aplicativos móveis, web, nativos e de desktop para várias empresas.

[Minthouse.dev](https://github.com/backend-br/vagas/issues/Minthouse.dev)

Estamos procurando uma pessoa desenvolvedoraem qualquer fuso horário, mas Portugal e Brasil têm preferência.

### Descrição da vaga

- Estamos procurando um pessoa desenvolvedora front-end para trabalhar em conjunto com nosso membro da equipe e pessoa desenvolvedoraback-end.
- Se o projeto for bem-sucedido, estamos procurando alguém para ficar e assumir mais trabalho a longo prazo.
- Como o trabalho é remoto, o candidato(a) ideal deve ser muito comunicativo e independent

### Local

Remoto, Portugal

### Requisitos

#### Obrigatórios:

- Inglês fluente
- 3 anos ReactJS
- Conhecimento de REST APIs
- Typescript, HTML, CSS
- Conhecimento de Git/Github
- Conhecimento de MERN stack

### Desejáveis:

- Otimização da eficiência do front-end

### Diferenciais:

- Exemplos de design front-end


### Benefícios

- Salário mensal de US$ 1.800 a US$ 2.000 para o primeiro projeto, oportunidade de aumento para os projetos seguintes.
- 13º Salário.
- Oportunidade de trabalhar diretamente com start-ups de todo o mundo e ampliar sua rede de contatos.
- Independência no trabalho, nas escolhas técnicas e nos horários. Desde que o trabalho seja bom, nos não importamos com a forma como você o realiza.



### Contratação

Freelance

### Como se candidatar

luccaocamargo@gmail.com

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

7 dias

### Keywords

ReactJS

items.title: [Híbrido] Experienced Frontend Developer @ Mindera
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love.

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera.
We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient, and scalable software systems that create an impact on their users and businesses across the world.
You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together.
Our culture reflects our lean and self-management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication.
We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment.

Our offices are located: Porto, Portugal | Aveiro, Portugal | Coimbra, Portugal | Leicester, UK | San Diego, USA | San Francisco, USA | Chennai, India | Bengaluru, India | Cluj-Napoca, Romania | Blumenau, Brazil

### Descrição da vaga

At Mindera we are building a world-class team and would love it for you to join us. As an Experienced Frontend Developer, you will be involved in the development of usable, performant, accessible, and maintainable web applications with a focus on a delightful user experience.

As an Experienced Frontend Developer, you will have a passion for software development and an excellent understanding of how to define and deliver solutions iteratively and collaboratively. You will be involved in all areas of delivery, playing an integral part in helping them continuously improve by sharing your own knowledge, experience, and insights.

You will be part of the building of fully responsive, highly-available web applications while influencing architecture and technical direction.

You’ll get to help design and evolve the architecture of our web apps and to be part of the journey of continuous improvement to make the team the best that it can be. You will also be getting your hands dirty in the code on a regular basis.
You will help your team of Front-end Engineers who will look for you for advice, direction, and collaborative decision-making.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

What you will be doing:

- Developing and maintaining features in a collaborative, Agile environment;
- You will be helping your team’s engineering including the development
- processes, coding standards and best practices, technology/language selection, CI/CD pipeline, test strategy
- and release strategy; work with DevOps on infrastructure and environment strategy, taking a leadership role in their area of specialization and experience.
- Writing testable code and ensuring the test coverage stays at the agreed level;
- Documenting your code;
- Take ownership of your code every step of the way - from development to deployment and maintenance;
- Diagnose issues in production and devise solutions for them;
- Work both autonomously and collaboratively to complete tasks;
- Be an integral part of solutions design and implementation;

### Local

Minders get to choose where to work from, either remotely, from one of our offices or both. We have offices in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

### Requisitos

- 6+ years of software engineering experience;
- In-depth knowledge of the web tech stack and client-side technologies;
- You value writing semantic and accessible HTML. You know that great web applications are built with more than just divs;
- You’re experienced in writing clean CSS for responsive layouts and understand how browsers render web pages, knowing what it takes to make them fast;
- You know JavaScript and/or TypeScript inside out;
- You have an inclusive development mindset and do your best to ensure web applications are usable by anyone, regardless of any disabilities;
- You care about security, use defensive programming and know how to prevent and mitigate common web attack vectors;
- Experience with React is required for this role and bonus points for knowing advanced patterns and understanding when to use SSR, CSR or hybrid approaches;
- Experience of developing large scale production environments;
- Experience with CI/CD workflows and writing automated tests;
- Experience of agile development practices, i.e. Scrum & Kanban;
- Bonus points for having worked with or developed design systems implementations in React;
- Ability to diagnose problems at any level (Client, HTTP/Network, Server, OS);
- You recognize the value of code reviews and have experience in mentoring teammates while helping them grow.


### Benefícios

The Things We Really Care About:

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers


Other Good Things:

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote from Portugal is also an option. Remote from other Countries will depend on your current location.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

Most of all, you get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together in a politics-free environment. Our culture reflects our lean and self-organization attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication. Freedom and Responsibility go hand in hand, and we value commitment, feedback, and empathy.


### Contratação

Contrato sem termo

### Como se candidatar

https://apply.workable.com/minderacraft/j/DC6A305247/

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

7 dias

### Keywords

react, javascript, typescript, HTML

### Alocação

- [ ] Alocado
- [ ] Remoto
- [ ] Presencial
- [X] Híbrido

### Regime

- [X] Contrato
- [ ] Freela
- [ ] RV

### Nível

- [ ] Júnior
- [ ] Pleno
- [X] Sênior
- [X] Especialista

### Período

- [X] Full time
- [ ] Part Time
- [ ] Projeto

### Remuneração

None

items.title: [Híbrido] Frontend Software Eng - React @ Mindera
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love.

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera.
We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient and scalable software systems that create an impact in their users and businesses across the world.
You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together.
Our culture reflects our lean and self management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication.
We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment.

Our offices are located: Porto, Portugal | Aveiro, Portugal | Coimbra, Portugal | Leicester, UK | San Diego, USA | San Francisco, USA | Chennai, India | Bengaluru, India | Cluj-Napoca, Romania | Blumenau, Brazil

### Descrição da vaga

Here at Mindera, we are continuously developing a fantastic team, and would love it for you to join us. As a Frontend Software Engineer you will be responsible for building fluid and responsive user interfaces for multiple platforms and devices.

We are looking for experienced Engineers with an appetite for solving complex problems and build seamless user interactions to world-class standards.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

What you will be doing:

- Developing and maintaining features in a collaborative, Agile environment;
- Writing testable code and ensuring the test coverage stays at the agreed level;
- Documenting your code;
- Take ownership of your code every step of the way - from development to deployment and maintenance;
- Diagnose issues in production and devise solutions for them;
- Work both autonomously and collaboratively to complete tasks;
- Be an integral part of solutions design and implementation;


### Local

Minders get to choose where to work from, either remotely, from one of our offices or both. We have offices in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

### Requisitos

You’re great at

- Vast Experience with Vanilla Javascript;
- Experience with React (mandatory):
- Experience with Frameworks such as Node.js;
- Semantic documents using HTML;
- Use of CSS pre/post-processors like PostCSS, Styled Components, LESS, SASS and/or others;
- Developing great user interfaces;
- Creating testable code and make testing a priority;
- Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban;
- Being passionate, self-driven and working with little supervision towards a common team or company purpose;

It also would be cool if you

- Use state management like Redux, MobX and/or other;
- Know module bundlers and task runners such as Webpack, Parcel, Rollup, Browserify, Grunt or Gulp;
- Have experience with Test Automation


### Benefícios

The Things We Really Care About:

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers

Other Good Things:

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote from Portugal is also an option. Remote from other Countries will depend on your current location.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

Most of all, you get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together in a politics-free environment. Our culture reflects our lean and self-organization attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication. Freedom and Responsibility go hand in hand, and we value commitment, feedback, and empathy.

### Contratação

Contrato sem termo

### Como se candidatar

https://apply.workable.com/minderacraft/j/6CE5BD7A4D/

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

7 dias

### Keywords

react, javascript, typescript, HTML

### Alocação

items.title: [Híbrido] Frontend Technical Lead @ Mindera
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love.

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera.
We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient and scalable software systems that create an impact in their users and businesses across the world.
You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together.
Our culture reflects our lean and self management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication.
We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment.

Our offices are located: Porto, Portugal | Aveiro, Portugal | Coimbra, Portugal | Leicester, UK | San Diego, USA | San Francisco, USA | Chennai, India | Bengaluru, India | Cluj-Napoca, Romania | Blumenau, Brazil

### Descrição da vaga

At Mindera we are building a world class team and would love it for you to join us. As a Frontend Technical Lead your main focus will be to lead the development of usable, performant, accessible, and maintainable web applications with a focus on a delightful user experience.

You will own the build of fully responsive eCommerce web applications, highly-available around the world, while influencing architecture and technical direction.

You’ll get to help design and evolve the architecture of our webapps and to be part of the journey of continuous improvement to make the team the best that it can be. Your code will be used by thousands of customers worldwide.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

### Local

Minders get to choose where to work from, either remotely, from one of our offices or both. We have offices in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

### Requisitos

- 8+ years of software engineering experience; bonus points for previous experience as a tech lead;
- In-depth knowledge of the web tech stack, from DNS to HTTP and client-side technologies;
- You value writing semantic and accessible HTML. You know that great web applications are built with more than just divs;
- You’re experienced in writing clean CSS for responsive layouts and understand how browsers render web pages, knowing what it takes to make them fast;
- You know JavaScript and/or TypeScript inside out, and have demonstrable experience in architecting large web applications;
- You have an inclusive development mindset and do your best to ensure web applications are usable by anyone, regardless of any disabilities;
- You care about security, use defensive programming and know how to prevent and mitigate common web attack vectors;
- Experience with React is required for this specific role and bonus points for knowing advanced patterns and understanding when to use SSR, CSR or hybrid approaches;
- Experience of developing and running large scale production environments in or closely with DevOps / SRE;
- Experience with CI/CD workflows and writing automated tests;
- Experience of agile development practices, i.e. Scrum & Kanban;
- Bonus points for having worked with or developed design systems implementations in React;
- Ability to diagnose problems at any level (Client, HTTP/Network, Server, OS);
- You recognise the value of code reviews and have experience in mentoring teammates while helping them grow.


### Benefícios

The Things We Really Care About:

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers

Other Good Things:

- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)

- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

Most of all, you get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together in a politics-free environment. Our culture reflects our lean and self-organization attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication. Freedom and Responsibility go hand in hand, and we value commitment, feedback, and empathy.

Our culture reflects our lean and self-management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication.
We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment.

Our offices are located: Porto, Portugal | Aveiro, Portugal | Coimbra, Portugal | Leicester, UK | San Diego, USA | San Francisco, USA | Chennai, India | Bengaluru, India | Cluj-Napoca, Romania | Blumenau, Brazil

### Descrição da vaga

At Mindera we are building a world-class team and would love it for you to join us. As an Experienced Frontend Developer, you will be involved in the development of usable, performant, accessible, and maintainable web applications with a focus on a delightful user experience.

As an Experienced Frontend Developer, you will have a passion for software development and an excellent understanding of how to define and deliver solutions iteratively and collaboratively. You will be involved in all areas of delivery, playing an integral part in helping them continuously improve by sharing your own knowledge, experience, and insights.

You will be part of the building of fully responsive, highly-available web applications while influencing architecture and technical direction.

You’ll get to help design and evolve the architecture of our web apps and to be part of the journey of continuous improvement to make the team the best that it can be. You will also be getting your hands dirty in the code on a regular basis.
You will help your team of Front-end Engineers who will look for you for advice, direction, and collaborative decision-making.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

What you will be doing:

- Developing and maintaining features in a collaborative, Agile environment;
- You will be helping your team’s engineering including the development
- processes, coding standards and best practices, technology/language selection, CI/CD pipeline, test strategy
- and release strategy; work with DevOps on infrastructure and environment strategy, taking a leadership role in their area of specialization and experience.
- Writing testable code and ensuring the test coverage stays at the agreed level;
- Documenting your code;
- Take ownership of your code every step of the way - from development to deployment and maintenance;
- Diagnose issues in production and devise solutions for them;
- Work both autonomously and collaboratively to complete tasks;
- Be an integral part of solutions design and implementation;


### Local

Minders get to choose where to work from, either remotely, from one of our offices or both. We have offices in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra. 

### Requisitos

Requirements:

- 6+ years of software engineering experience;
- In-depth knowledge of the web tech stack and client-side technologies;
- You value writing semantic and accessible HTML. You know that great web applications are built with more than just divs;
- You’re experienced in writing clean CSS for responsive layouts and understand how browsers render web pages, knowing what it takes to make them fast;
- You know JavaScript and/or TypeScript inside out;
- You have an inclusive development mindset and do your best to ensure web applications are usable by anyone, regardless of any disabilities;
- You care about security, use defensive programming and know how to prevent and mitigate common web attack vectors;
- Experience with React is required for this role and bonus points for knowing advanced patterns and understanding when to use SSR, CSR or hybrid approaches;
- Experience of developing large scale production environments;
- Experience with CI/CD workflows and writing automated tests;
- Experience of agile development practices, i.e. Scrum & Kanban;
- Bonus points for having worked with or developed design systems implementations in React;
- Ability to diagnose problems at any level (Client, HTTP/Network, Server, OS);
- You recognize the value of code reviews and have experience in mentoring teammates while helping them grow.


### Benefícios

The Things We Really Care About:

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers


Other Good Things:

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote from Portugal is also an option. Remote from other Countries will depend on your current location.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

Most of all, you get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together in a politics-free environment. Our culture reflects our lean and self-organization attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication. Freedom and Responsibility go hand in hand, and we value commitment, feedback, and empathy.

### Contratação

Contrato sem termo

### Como se candidatar

https://apply.workable.com/minderacraft/j/DC6A305247/

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

7 dias

### Keywords

_No response_

- [X] Híbrido

items.title: [Lisbon] Senior Frontend Engineer @ Flecto
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

The circular economy is entering its game-changer era… and we're here for it.

Flecto is a centralised platform built to streamline and uplift all forms of rental business models. We aim to nurture local rental businesses and knock down the barriers that have been holding back a whole new generation of consumers from building true resource-sharing communities. Our vision aims to reimagine traditional concepts of ownership by helping to build and manage rental experiences that feel as accessible and convenient as buying.

We’re incredibly proud that the Flecto vision is not only shared but backed by the best VCs around. Join us at the forefront of this massive culture shift.

### Descrição da vaga

Soft Skills

We are seeking individuals with the following soft skills:

Product-first mindset, motivated by solving complex challenges and putting the needs of users first.
Passionate and mindful individuals who share our vision and want to be part of something impactful that will reach millions of people.
Fast learners with a curious nature, who are able to adapt to different frameworks and prioritize project needs over technical expertise.
Team players who value mentoring, code reviewing, and being open to receiving and giving honest feedback to help others grow.


Hard Skills

Expertise in Javascript: We are looking for a skilled developer who knows Javascript inside and out. You don't care whether you're working with React, Angular, Vue, or any other framework / library - you know how to solve complex problems with ease.
Passion for Open Source: We value innovation and creativity, and we want someone who shares our passion for making ideas accessible to others. We encourage our team members to contribute to open source projects, and we would love to see your ideas come to life in this way.
Ability to Think Out-of-the-Box: We value efficiency and practicality, and we want someone who can create modular solutions that work smart and fast. We don't want you to waste time over-engineering, but we do expect you to think outside the box and find new and innovative ways to solve problems.
Strong Communication Skills: Working from home can be challenging, so we need someone who can communicate effectively with our tech team. You'll be expected to be proactive in communicating any issues, and be open to discussing and sharing knowledge during our Tech Talks.
Knowledge of Best Coding Practices: We want someone who has a deep understanding of best coding practices and can contribute to our guidelines and review code. We take pride in the quality of our codebase and want you to help us maintain this standard.


Our stack (Frontend)

Monorepo Apps: Apps using latest NextJS version
Monorepo Package: Design System using Storybook and React, Shared Modules, Utils
Package: Core ( Redux Actions and Store )
CI/CD: Vercel


### Local

Lisbon, Portugal - Hybrid or Remote

### Requisitos

Living in EU

Experience with Vercel Ecosystem, NextJS, Edge Computing, SSR, ISR, PWA and Package Oriented Design with turborepo and/or NX at an advanced level.
Advanced experience with writing test suites for functions, classes, and components, using Jest and Playwright or similar tools.
In-depth understanding of browser testing and debugging, with experience using specific tools or techniques.
Strong understanding of the entire web development process (design, development, and deployment).
Ability to write understandable and testable code that is optimized for maintainability, using specific practices such as modularity and commenting.


### Benefícios

Salary: Starting at 55.000€ / year
Stock Options
Flexible Remote with an office in Lisbon
Flexible Benefits

### Contratação

Contract

### Como se candidatar

send email for alexandro.oliveira@flecto.io or https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/3594265432/?refId=Wq3K%2FCDiSx%2BxqFKSCYoEhA%3D%3D&trackingId=Wq3K%2FCDiSx%2BxqFKSCYoEhA%3D%3D

items.title: [PORTUGAL] Front-End Developer na INTEGER Consulting!
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

O meu nome é Filipe Marques e faço parte da INTEGER! A INTEGER é uma empresa de consultoria com foco em consultoria de IT (Outsourcing) e desenvolvimento de Software e Produto (internamente).
Somos conhecidos no mercado, por darmos um ótimo acompanhamento aos nossos consultores, pela experiência que temos e pela ajuda que damos a profissionais de outros países que querem vir para Portugal!


### Descrição da vaga

As vagas que tenho em aberto atualmente são:
👉 Gestor de Projeto
👉 Java Developer
👉 iOS Developer
👉 Salesforce Developer
👉 QA – Test Automation
👉 Frontend Developer (React.JS ou Angular)

### Local

PORTUGAL - Primeiros meses remotos, mas tem de existir real interesse em vir para Portugal

### Requisitos

Envia o teu CV, atualizado e em inglês, para filipe.marques@integer.pt !
OU entra em contacto comigo, por aqui - Whatsapp (+351 910 385 109), com o teu currículo em anexo, de preferência em inglês.



### Benefícios

- Plano de saúde (para o candidato e família);
- Alojamento nas primeiras duas semanas em PT;
- Acompanhamento durante todo o processo de vinda para PT;
- Acesso gratuito à Udemy;
- Acesso gratuito a plataformas para o desenvolvimento da língua inglesa;
- Acesso à nossa rede de parcerias - Descontos em serviços, academia, cosmética, restauração, etc...;

Descobre estas e mais oportunidades e os seus requisitos, no nosso site: https://lnkd.in/gE4c_bB


### Contratação

*

### Como se candidatar

Envia o teu CV, atualizado e em inglês, para filipe.marques@integer.pt ! OU entra em contacto comigo, por aqui - Whatsapp (+351 910 385 109), com o teu currículo em anexo, de preferência em inglês.

1/2 semanas

items.title: [REMOTO] Pessoa Desenvolvedora Fullstack Sênior - PHP e JS @ [Feedz]
items.description:
🚀 A FEEDZ:
Somos uma HRTech e nosso propósito é criar ambientes de trabalho mais felizes, tudo isso através de um software completo de gestão de pessoas humanizado! Por isso, começar pelo nosso próprio ninho é tão importante!

Crescemos mais de 400% em 2021 e continuamos evoluindo em 2022, tudo isso através de um clima animado, com muito desenvolvimento e respeito para todos! (Se quiser conhecer melhor nosso ninho, voa pra cá: https://www.feedz.com.br/vagas/) 💙 Quer mais? Estamos no modelo totalmente remoto, então você pode fazer parte do nosso ninho no conforto da sua casa!!

Estamos buscando uma pessoa para o cargo de Pessoa Desenvolvedora Fullstack Sênior(PHP e JS) que irá atuar no nosso time de Produto, em uma squad multidisciplinar(5 a 8 membros) e trabalhando diretamente com nosso gerente de produto em um time de alta performance, desenvolvendo sistemas que impactam mais de 100 mil usuários diretamente.

No dia a dia você vai ter bastante contato com SlimPHP, Eloquent, PHPUnit, Twig, Vue.js, MySQL, Docker, entre outras. Trabalhamos com projetos ágeis, sempre prezando a comunicação e a colaboração entre os membros do time.

Aqui na Feedz valorizamos muito a diversidade e queremos Parrots que queiram voar conosco, independente da etnia, gênero, sexualidade, nacionalidade, idade ou deficiência! Quer crescer com a gente? Vem pro ninho 💛

📚 RESPONSABILIDADES E ATIVIDADES:
Desenvolvimento backend com PHP (Com conhecimentos no framework Laravel) ;
Desenvolvimento de frontend com CSS, HTML e JS (Com conhecimento em Vue.JS aplicando nosso design system)
Aplicar boas práticas alinhadas com o time no desenvolvimento (criando códigos coerentes e alinhados ao Clean Code; desenvolvendo com foco em segurança, patterns, automação, etc);
Desenvolver novos módulos na plataforma;
Desenvolvimento e aplicação de testes automatizados;
Fazer a gestão da informação das demandas atualizando o status dos projetos.

🥇 PRÉ-REQUISITOS:

A partir de 7 anos de experiência em desenvolvimento web com produtos digitais(preferencialmente SaaS);
Experiência a partir de 3 anos com PHP;
Experiência a partir de 1 ano com Javascript;
Experiência com sistema de alto volume de dados;
Experiência com testes unitários ou de integração;
Estar trabalhando atualmente com as tecnologias de nossa stack;
Experiência com banco de dados relacional (Atualmente usamos MySQL 8);
Conhecimento em boas práticas de código e vivência com times de tecnologia ágeis!
🎯DIFERENCIAIS:
Conhecimento com Slim, Laravel ou e Vue.JS.

✨ BENEFÍCIOS:

100% Home Office (não iremos voltar ao trabalho presencial!!)
Vale Comida (R$700)
Plano de Saúde Unimed(subsidiado pela Feedz)
Plano odontológico Nacional da Bradesco Dental(subsidiado pela Feedz)
Auxílio Parrot Feliz (R$100/mês de investimento no desenvolvimento pessoal, saúde física ou mental do Parrot)
Auxílio Contas (R$160/mês)
Auxílio Parrot Casamenteiro(R$250 quando Parrots casam)
Auxílio Ninhada(R$250 no nascimento ou adoção de pequenos Parrots)
Happy Bird(day) (um dia de folga no mês de aniversário)
Licença paternidade estendida(21 dias)
Licença maternidade estendida(6 meses)
Ifood Office(voucher para usar dentro do app em alguns eventos internos)
Para você ter um voo com conforto, na Feedz oferecemos um auxílio de R$1.000 para materiais, como mesa e cadeira, para seu home office e enviamos todos os equipamentos eletrônicos necessários!

💰 SALÁRIO 7.500 A 9.500 (CLT)*
*A depender do tempo de experiência | 40 horas semanais

📅 ETAPAS DO PROCESSO:
Para essa posição, temos as seguintes etapas para avaliação:

Triagem de currículo;
Bate papo técnico;
Bate papo cultural;
Contratação!

Para entender melhor sobre cada etapa e como funciona nosso processo seletivo, acesse nosso playbook da pessoa candidata: https://bit.ly/3EWnroW

Candidate-se em: https://enliztjob.app.link/9oAwIGlnBub

items.description:
## Nossa empresa

A YellowIpe é uma consultora da área de tecnologia presente em Portugal que pretende reforçar a sua equipa com programadores React. 

Cuidamos da Emissão do visto e ajudamos com todo o processo de imigração  ✅

## Descrição da vaga

Procuramos um programador React que seja apaixonado por desenvolvimento de software. 

## Local

Remoto em Portugal.

- Plano de saúde
- Seguro de vida
- VR

## Requisitos

- Domínio de React; 
- Formação em Engenharia de Software, Sistemas de Informação, Analise e desenvolvimento de Sistemas ou área similar;
- Experiência superior a 3 anos com desenvolvimento em React;
- Bom nível de Inglês, falado e escrito. 

**Desejáveis:**

Recibos Verdes ou CTI

Por favor envie um email para recrutamento@yellowipe.io com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga FrontEnd . 

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 5 dias após cada processo.
E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: recrutamento@yellowipe.io

- Plano odontológico Nacional da Bradesco Dental(subsidiado pela Feedz)
- Auxílio Parrot Feliz (R$100/mês de investimento no desenvolvimento pessoal, saúde física ou mental do Parrot)
- Auxílio Contas (R$160/mês)
- Auxílio Parrot Casamenteiro(R$250 quando Parrots casam)
- Auxílio Ninhada(R$250 no nascimento ou adoção de pequenos Parrots)
- Happy Bird(day) (um dia de folga no mês de aniversário)
- Licença paternidade estendida(21 dias)
- Licença maternidade estendida(6 meses)
- Descontos nas empresas conveniadas com a ACATE
- Ifood Office(voucher para usar dentro do app em alguns eventos internos)
- Para você ter um voo com conforto, na Feedz oferecemos um auxílio de R$1.000 para materiais, como mesa e cadeira, para seu home office e enviamos todos os equipamentos eletrônicos necessários!

💰 SALÁRIO 7.500 A 9.500 (CLT)*
*A depender do tempo de experiência

Candidate-se em: https://enliztjob.app.link/7BuaoOyTUsb

items.title: [Porto] Frontend Technical Lead - Fashion Tech eCommerce na Mindera
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

At Mindera we are building a world class team and would love it for you to join us. As a Frontend Technical Lead your main focus will be to lead the development of usable, performant, accessible, and maintainable web applications with a focus on a delightful user experience.

You will own the build of fully responsive eCommerce web applications, highly-available around the world, while influencing architecture and technical direction.

You’ll get to help design and evolve the architecture of our webapps and to be part of the journey of continuous improvement to make the team the best that it can be. Your code will be used by thousands of customers worldwide.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

## Local

Remote or Office or Hybrid, your choice! Our offices are in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

## Benefícios

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers

#### Diferenciais

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote is also an option.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

## Requisitos

- 6+ years of software engineering experience; bonus points for previous experience as a tech lead;
- In-depth knowledge of the web tech stack, from DNS to HTTP and client-side technologies;
- You value writing semantic and accessible HTML. You know that great web applications are built with more than just divs;
- You’re experienced in writing clean CSS for responsive layouts and understand how browsers render web pages, knowing what it takes to make them fast;
- You know JavaScript and/or TypeScript inside out, and have demonstrable experience in architecting large web applications;
- You have an inclusive development mindset and do your best to ensure web applications are usable by anyone, regardless of any disabilities;
- You care about security, use defensive programming and know how to prevent and mitigate common web attack vectors;
- Experience with React is required for this specific role and bonus points for knowing advanced patterns and understanding when to use SSR, CSR or hybrid approaches;
- Experience of developing and running large scale production environments in or closely with DevOps / SRE;
- Experience with CI/CD workflows and writing automated tests;
- Experience of agile development practices, i.e. Scrum & Kanban;
- Bonus points for having worked with or developed design systems implementations in React;
- Ability to diagnose problems at any level (Client, HTTP/Network, Server, OS);
- You recognise the value of code reviews and have experience in mentoring teammates while helping them grow.

## Contratação

Full-time

## Nossa empresa

At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love 💛

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera 💻

We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient, and scalable software systems that create an impact on their users and businesses across the world 🌐

You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together 🚀

Our culture reflects our lean and self-management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication 🧭

We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment ⭐

Check out our [Blog](http://mindera.com/blog) and our [Handbook](http://bit.ly/MinderaHandbook)!

Our offices are located: Porto, Aveiro, Coimbra - Portugal 🇵🇹 | Leicester - UK 🇬🇧 | San Diego, San Francisco - USA 🇺🇸 | Chennai, Bengaluru - India 🇮🇳 | Cluj-Napoca - Romania 🇷🇴 | Blumenau - Brazil 🇧🇷

## Como se candidatar

Please send an email with your CV to [scout@mindera.com](mailto:scout@mindera.com)

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

We normally respond within a week, our max is 14 days.

## Labels

- Pleno
- Remoto
- Sénior

items.title: [Porto] Front-End Test Automation Engineer na MINDERA
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga
Here at Mindera, we are continuously developing a fantastic team and would love it for you to join us.

Do you have the feeling that you keep breaking everything? Working as a Quality Assurance Engineer at Mindera, you will ensure that high standards are kept throughout the development process and within the product deliverables. You will also have an important role in planning and developing automated test suites.

National and international expected traveling time varies according to project/client and organisational needs: 0%-15% estimated.

## Local
Remote or Office or Hybrid, your choice! Our offices are in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

## Benefícios

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers

#### Diferenciais

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote is also an option.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

## Requisitos

- Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban
- Leading quality assurance processes and functional testing
- Working with Software Engineers to ensure the right levels of test automation are built to your standards
- Being versatile. Times change and with them so do requirements, meaning that you may be asked to switch between projects and, consequently, tech stacks. Hence, although we don’t require a specific knowledge of any language, you are expected to be comfortable with high-level programming, in general. (Java, C#, Node.js, Python, etc)
- Testing web applications
- Using source control systems (preferably Git)
- Breaking things and finding problems!
- Knowing how web applications are used by customers and how that translates into what needs to be tested.
- Designing test scenarios, scripts or procedures that fit with the concepts of Test Automation and Continuous Delivery
- Creating resilient automated test suites to exercise Web and Mobile applications with tools like Selenium, Selenide, Cypress, Playwright, Nighwatch.js, etc.
- Being self-driven and working with little supervision towards a common team or company purpose.
- Being motivated to keep learning about test automation

**What you will be doing**

- Validating that what you'll be delivering, as a team, meets the business expectations all the way to, and including, Production
- Continuously find ways to improve the quality of the product
- Implementing mechanisms to mitigate regressions as much as possible, while continuously validating the quality of what's being delivered
- Evangelize quality standards in the team! Quality is the responsibility of absolutely everyone, but you're there to make sure they don't forget :)
- Be the advocate the user (and the business) needs! Your input is invaluable to providing the most user-friendly experience possible
- Actively participate and contribute to solution designs

## Contratação
Full-time

## Nossa empresa
At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love 💛 

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera 💻 

We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient and scalable software systems that create an impact in their users and businesses across the world 🌐 

You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together.

Our culture reflects our lean and self management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication.

We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment ⭐ 

Check out our [Blog](http://mindera.com/blog) and our [Handbook](http://bit.ly/MinderaHandbook)!

Our offices are located: Porto, Aveiro e Coimbra -Portugal 🇵🇹 | Leicester - UK 🇬🇧 | San Diego, San Francisco - USA 🇺🇸  | Chennai, 
 Bengaluru - India 🇮🇳  | Cluj-Napoca - Romania 🇷🇴  | Blumenau -Brazil 🇧🇷 

## Como se candidatar
Please send an email with your CV to [scout@mindera.com](mailto:scout@mindera.com)

## Tempo médio de feedbacks
We normally respond within a week, our max is 14 days.

## Labels
- Pleno
- Remoto
- Sênior

items.title: [Portugal] Frontend Developer na Mindera
items.description:
<!-- 
==================================================
POR FAVOR, SÓ POSTE SE A VAGA FOR PARA FRONT-END!

Não faça distinção de gênero no título da vaga.

Use: "Front-End Developer" ao invés de 
"Desenvolvedor Front-End" \o/

Exemplo: `[São Paulo] Front-End Developer na NOME DA EMPRESA`
==================================================
-->

## Descrição da vaga

At Mindera we are building a world-class team and would love it for you to join us. As a Frontend Developer, you will be involved in the development of usable, performant, accessible, and maintainable web applications with a focus on a delightful user experience.

As an Experienced Frontend Developer, you will have a passion for software development and an excellent understanding of how to define and deliver solutions iteratively and collaboratively. You will be involved in all areas of delivery, playing an integral part in helping them continuously improve by sharing your own knowledge, experience, and insights.

You will be part of the building of fully responsive, highly-available Fashion Tech web applications while influencing architecture and technical direction.

You’ll get to help design and evolve the architecture of our web apps and to be part of the journey of continuous improvement to make the team the best that it can be. You will also be getting your hands dirty in the code on a regular basis.
You will be the leader of your team of Front-end Engineers who will look for you for advice, direction, and collaborative decision-making.

## Local

Remote or Office or Hybrid, your choice! Our offices are in Porto, Aveiro and Coimbra.

## Benefícios

- Health Insurance, because health comes first
- Flexible working hours
- Open holidays, take the time you need for yourself
- Profit distribution for everyone
- Mindera Annual Trip, Sports, and sharing groups to connect and have fun!
- Training & conferences, create your own training plan
- Child Care vouchers

#### Diferenciais

- Choose Laptop & Peripherals that best suit your needs
- Hotspot with unlimited usage (PT), for work or Netflix ;)
- We have amazing offices in Porto, Aveiro, and Coimbra if you want to physically connect with minders. Remote is also an option.
- At the offices, we have a wide range of snacks to keep you fed and healthy
- Partnerships with local businesses

## Requisitos

- 6+ years of software engineering experience;
- In-depth knowledge of the web tech stack and client-side technologies;
- You value writing semantic and accessible HTML. You know that great web applications are built with more than just divs;
- You’re experienced in writing clean CSS for responsive layouts and understand how browsers render web pages, knowing what it takes to make them fast;
- You know JavaScript and/or TypeScript inside out;
- You have an inclusive development mindset and do your best to ensure web applications are usable by anyone, regardless of any disabilities;
- You care about security, use defensive programming and know how to prevent and mitigate common web attack vectors;
- Experience with React is required for this specific role and bonus points for knowing advanced patterns and understanding when to use SSR, CSR or hybrid approaches;
- Experience of developing large scale production environments;
- Experience with CI/CD workflows and writing automated tests;
- Experience of agile development practices, i.e. Scrum & Kanban;
- Bonus points for having worked with or developed design systems implementations in React;
- Ability to diagnose problems at any level (Client, HTTP/Network, Server, OS);
- You recognize the value of code reviews and have experience in mentoring teammates while helping them grow.

**What you'll be doing:**
- Developing and maintaining features in a collaborative, Agile environment;
- You will be the Lead for your team’s engineering including the development
processes, coding standards and best practices, technology/language selection, CI/CD pipeline, test strategy and release strategy; work with Dev Ops on infrastructure and environment strategy, taking a leadership role in their area of specialization and experience.
- Writing testable code and ensuring the test coverage stays at the agreed level;
- Documenting your code;
- Take ownership of your code every step of the way - from development to deployment and maintenance;
- Diagnose issues in production and devise solutions for them;
- Work both autonomously and collaboratively to complete tasks;
- Be an integral part of solutions design and implementation;

## Contratação

Full-time

## Nossa empresa

At Mindera we use technology to build products we are proud of, with people we love 💛

Software Engineering Applications, including Web and Mobile, are at the core of what we do at Mindera 💻

We partner with our clients, to understand their products and deliver high-performance, resilient, and scalable software systems that create an impact on their users and businesses across the world 🌐

You get to work with a bunch of great people, where the whole team owns the project together 🚀

Our culture reflects our lean and self-management attitude. We encourage our colleagues to take risks, make decisions, work in a collaborative way and talk to everyone to enhance communication 🧭

We are proud of our work and we love to learn all and everything while navigating through an Agile, Lean and collaborative environment ⭐

Check out our [Blog](http://mindera.com/blog) and our [Handbook](http://bit.ly/MinderaHandbook)!

Our offices are located: Porto, Aveiro, Coimbra - Portugal 🇵🇹 | Leicester - UK 🇬🇧 | San Diego, San Francisco - USA 🇺🇸 | Chennai, Bengaluru - India 🇮🇳 | Cluj-Napoca - Romania 🇷🇴 | Blumenau - Brazil 🇧🇷

## Como se candidatar

Please send an email with your CV to scout@mindera.com 

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

We normally respond within a week, our max is 14 days.

## Labels
- Remote
- Sênior
